g.text: ✔ admin can update fee and pause flag
✔ mints a Core asset and initializes the Node account
✔ open: locks exactly amount lamports into session PDA
✔ cancel: full refund when no usage
✔ expire: refunds unsettled remainder after expiry
✔ register → open → settle splits funds + bumps reputation
✔ rejects a stale nonce on checkpoint
✔ challenge after the deadline is rejected
✔ expire after checkpoint: provider keeps checkpointed amount
✔ cancel after usage has started must fail
✔ replay: re-settling settled state is rejected
✔ open → settle splits tokens + bumps reputation
